Connect.Message: Connect to the world of decentralized applications and finance.

Decentralized.Message: Gives you full control over your digital assets and allows you to interact with dApps.

Secure.Message: Using advanced security protocols to protect your digital assets and personal information.

ImportWallet.Title: Import Existing Wallet
ImportWallet.Subtitle: Restore your wallet from a seed phrase or private key
ImportWallet.PhrasePlaceholder: Paste your 12 or 24 word seed phrase here...
ImportWallet.PrivateKeyPlaceholder: Paste your private key (64 hex chars)...

CreateWallet.Title: Create New Wallet
CreateWallet.Subtitle: Set up your secure wallet to get started
CreateWallet.Name: Wallet Name
CreateWallet.Agreement: I agree to the terms and conditions
CreateWallet.ErrorLength: Password must be between 6 and 32 characters
CreateWallet.ErrorGenerate: Failed to generate wallet. Please try again
CreateWallet.ErrorSave: Failed to save wallet. Please try again

Unlock.Title: Unlock Wallet
Unlock.Subtitle: Enter your password to open your wallet
Unlock.Hint: Your wallet data stays on this device and is decrypted locally.
Unlock.Recovery: If you forget your password, you will not be able to recover it.
Unlock.ErrorMissing: Wallet data could not be loaded
Unlock.ErrorGeneric: Unable to unlock wallet right now

Dashboard.Title: Wallet Ready
Dashboard.Subtitle: Your wallet is unlocked and ready to use
Dashboard.SignPlaceholder: Type a message you want to sign
Dashboard.EmptySignature: Your signature will appear here after you sign a message
Dashboard.SignHint: Please enter a message before signing
